title: Living in Boulder vlog 1 -  25 - 2017: Bi-weekly history test page & Colosseum

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder apartment on January 25, 2017, discussing a potential skin cancer spot he plans to have checked, shoulder pain he's experiencing from inactivity, and his excitement about creating a bi-weekly history test page. He also mentions buying MSM and fish oil supplements, trouble with image rotation software while working on a Colosseum tracing project, and considers starting swimming to address his shoulder pain.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has been avoiding it but recognizes he needs to start, especially swimming, to address worsening shoulder and back pain
Very excited about the project and wants to start it soon
Spent $60 on supplements and is now out of money, feels he needs to get on Patreon
Acknowledges he's taken on too many projects but feels he's made enough progress that even slowing down will eventually get him to his goals
Frustrated that the text-to-speech feature doesn't work on decade pages unlike other Wikipedia articles
